Section text:
点点数据-二次元移动游戏体验评测体系
来源：点点数据自主研究及绘制
5大维度体系、18项细分指标构筑点点数据游戏体验测评模型
。

message.content:
This section introduces the "DianDian Data ACG Mobile Game Experience Evaluation System" and supports retrieval for the following:
- **Topic & Entity:** What proprietary framework does DianDian Data use to assess ACG (二次元) mobile game experiences?
- **Metrics & Structure:** How is the evaluation model organized? (Answer: Constructed from 5 major dimensions and 18 sub-indicators.)
- **Source & Date:** Who developed the model and when was it published? (Answer: Independently researched and drawn by DianDian Data; © 2025.)
- **Content Type & Location:** What format presents the methodology? (Answer: A proprietary visual model/framework diagram spanning pages 9-10.)
- **Claims & Evidence:** What is the core assertion of the system? (Answer: Mobile game experience can be systematically evaluated using this specific dimensional and indicator-based architecture, backed by DianDian's internal research.)
The section serves as a foundational reference for the structural components, proprietary metrics, and methodological claims of DianDian's game experience assessment framework.

response_text:
This section introduces the "DianDian Data ACG Mobile Game Experience Evaluation System" and supports retrieval for the following:
- **Topic & Entity:** What proprietary framework does DianDian Data use to assess ACG (二次元) mobile game experiences?
- **Metrics & Structure:** How is the evaluation model organized? (Answer: Constructed from 5 major dimensions and 18 sub-indicators.)
- **Source & Date:** Who developed the model and when was it published? (Answer: Independently researched and drawn by DianDian Data; © 2025.)
- **Content Type & Location:** What format presents the methodology? (Answer: A proprietary visual model/framework diagram spanning pages 9-10.)
- **Claims & Evidence:** What is the core assertion of the system? (Answer: Mobile game experience can be systematically evaluated using this specific dimensional and indicator-based architecture, backed by DianDian's internal research.)
The section serves as a foundational reference for the structural components, proprietary metrics, and methodological claims of DianDian's game experience assessment framework.
